analysis_notes: Modeled ripgrep path:line:column match output with the executable-json backend and fixture-backed parser plugin.
Modeled git branch --verbose output with fixed-width heuristic parsing and branch/tracking variants.
Modeled GitHub CLI pull-request list output with fixed-width heuristic parsing.
Modeled aws s3 ls bucket listing output with fixed-width heuristic parsing.
Modeled docker ps compact table output with fixed-width heuristic parsing.
